units.name: Remedy
units.prompt: Stay adjacent to the most threatened ally. Use patch on the most wounded teammate. If all healthy, use overclock on your damage dealer.

units.name: Marksman
units.prompt: Position for clear sight lines. Prioritize killing wounded enemies with precision_shot. If forced to move, retreat away from threats. Suppressing_fire to slow rushers.

units.name: Watcher
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Snare
units.prompt: Place traps on tiles enemies are likely to move through. Use pulse if 2+ enemies are adjacent. Stay near allies for mutual support.

units.name: Seer
units.prompt: Use scan to reveal enemy prompts and cloaked units. Stay at max range (≤4 tiles for scan). Use recalibrate on wounded allies to buff them. Keep distance from enemies and avoid adjacent vectors.

units.name: Hawk
units.prompt: Stay at maximum range. Use precision_shot on the most wounded enemy to secure kills. If no one is wounded, target the enemy medic. Never move adjacent to enemies.

actions.thinking: All enemies are out of scan range (dist 5-7, scan range 4). I need to advance north to bring enemies into scan range. Moving to (0,3) gives me 3 tiles north, bringing Snare to dist=2 and potentially others closer. After moving, I can scan Snare at (1,4) which would be within 4 tiles.

Marksman and Watcher are both exactly dist=4 but shown as inRange=false. I need to move closer to get one in scan range. Moving to (3,3) reduces dist to Marksman to 3 and Watcher to 3, putting both in scan range. I'll move first then scan Watcher (oracle scan reveals prompt which is higher value intel).

Watcher is wounded at (0,3) with 5/6 HP. I'm at (4,0). I need to move toward Watcher to eventually heal them. Orders say stay adjacent to most threatened ally. Watcher is wounded, Marksman is full HP. Move toward Watcher - best I can do in 3 movement is reach (3,2) or similar, closing distance. No allies adjacent so no ability useful this turn.

Seer is at dist=3, within precision_shot range (≤2 tiles means I need dist≤2, so dist=3 is out of range). Let me reconsider: precision_shot range is ≤2 tiles. Seer is at dist=3, so not in range for precision_shot. I should move closer to get Seer in range. Moving to (2,3) puts me at dist=1 from Seer at (3,3)? No: (2,3) to (3,3) = dist 1+0=1... wait, Manhattan: |2-3|+|3-3|=1. That's adjacent, but Snare is at (1,4) - dist from (2,3) to (1,4) = 1+1=2, not adjacent. So I can use precision_shot. But wait - Snare is a vector, which blocks precision_shot when adjacent. From (2,3), Snare at (1,4) is dist=2, not adjacent, so no block. Move to (2,3) and precision_shot Seer at (3,3).

Marksman is at dist 2, in range for precision_shot. No wounded enemies, no medic in range. Orders say target medic but Remedy is out of range. Marksman is the only target in range. I haven't moved so precision_shot deals full 2dmg. Stay at current position to avoid closing distance.

Round 1, enemies approaching from south. Marksman is wounded at (2,3) and likely to advance north. I should place a trap on a tile they're likely to move through. (2,4) is directly between me and Marksman - a natural path they might step through. I'll move to (0,4) to get away from the front and place a trap at (2,4) to catch advancing enemies.

Marksman is wounded and adjacent at dist=1, planning to shoot me. Remedy is also adjacent. I need to move away to maintain scan range and avoid being adjacent. Move to (4,3) to stay at safe range, then scan Remedy to reveal their prompt — Watcher is already known.

I'm adjacent to Snare's denial zone, blocking my scan ability. Priority: move away from Snare first to escape denial, then scan a high-value target. Moving to (1,4) gets me away from Snare and within range of Hawk and Seer. From (1,4), Seer is at dist=3 (4,3) and Hawk at (2,5) is dist=3 — both in scan range. Seer is the oracle priority target. After moving to (1,4), scan Seer at (4,3) to reveal their strategy.
actions.secondResult: Cannot use scan — adjacent to enemy Vector (Denial)

actions.thinking: Marksman is at 2/4 HP (most wounded, critically low) at (2,3), distance 2. I need to move adjacent to Marksman to heal. From (3,2), moving to (2,2) puts me adjacent to Marksman at (2,3). Then I can patch Marksman.

No enemies are wounded, so orders say target the enemy medic (Remedy). Remedy is at (2,2), distance 3 — out of range from current position (2,5). I need to move closer. Valid moves include (2,4) but that's a trap. (3,4) gets me to distance 2 from Remedy at (2,2)? No — dist from (3,4) to (2,2) = |3-2|+|4-2| = 1+2 = 3, still out of range. What about Marksman or Watcher who are in range? Orders say target medic if no one is wounded, but Remedy is out of range. Fall back to best available target in range. Marksman is a striker (higher threat), Watcher is oracle. I'll shoot Marksman with precision_shot (2 dmg). I'm not moving so no penalty. I'm at (2,5), Marksman at (2,3) — dist 2, in range, no adjacency to Vector. Fire precision_shot on Marksman.

I'm at (2,3) with 2HP, enemies Hawk at (2,5) dist=2 and Seer at (4,3) dist=2. Both in precision_shot range. Snare vector at (0,4) dist=3 — safe from adjacency. I haven't moved this turn, so precision_shot deals 2dmg. Hawk is healthy (4HP), Seer is healthy. Either target dies in 2 hits. Seer is an oracle — high threat. Shoot Seer with precision_shot for 2dmg. Then wait or reposition. I should stay put to avoid moving penalty on shot. Fire precision_shot at Seer (4,3).

Watcher is adjacent at (1,4) - perfect pulse target. But orders say pulse if 2+ enemies adjacent, and only Watcher is adjacent. Marksman is at (2,3), wounded and moving north likely. Trap at (2,4) already placed. I should pulse Watcher since they're right next to me and take 1 dmg, plus use my Denial passive to suppress their abilities. Then consider moving to control more territory or placing another trap. Valid trap tiles must be empty and within range 2 - but I'm adjacent to enemy Watcher, so trap is blocked by Denial... wait, Denial blocks enemy abilities. My own trap ability - can I use it? The warning says 'trap blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector' - Watcher is an oracle not a vector, so trap should work. Actually wait - Watcher is adjacent at dist=1. The rules say trap is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector specifically. Watcher is oracle, so trap is fine. But orders say pulse if 2+ enemies adjacent - only 1 adjacent. So I should pulse anyway since Watcher is right there for free damage, then move to place a trap on a choke point. Move to (1,3) to block Marksman's path and threaten pulse next turn, or stay and pulse now. I'll pulse first (Watcher adjacent), then move to (1,5) to support Hawk at (2,5) and deny the flank.

I'm adjacent to Snare's denial zone, blocking my scan ability. I need to move away from Snare first to re-enable scanning. Moving to (0,3) puts me 2 tiles from Snare (no longer adjacent) and keeps me in range of Hawk and Seer. From (0,3) I can scan Hawk at dist=3 or move closer to scan Seer. Priority: escape denial zone, then scan Hawk to reveal strategy.

Marksman is wounded at dist 2 and just shot me. Scanning Remedy would reveal their prompt (already known). Snare is a Vector ally at (1,5) - Watcher failed scan last turn because adjacent to Snare. I'm at 3HP, vulnerable. Priority: scan Marksman (wounded, dist 2, in range) to deal 1dmg and confirm their prompt. Then move away to maintain distance. Actually Marksman prompt unknown - scan them. Move to (5,3) to increase distance from melee threats while keeping enemies in scan range.
Marksman is critically wounded at 1/4 HP and is adjacent to me at (2,3) — top priority for patch. Move to (2,3) is not needed since Marksman is already adjacent. I'll patch Marksman first, then wait.

Seer is wounded and at dist=3, out of precision_shot range (max 2). Hawk is healthy at dist=2, in range. Snare is 3 tiles away so no adjacency threat. Priority: use precision_shot on Hawk (2dmg would drop healthy striker significantly), then wait. I haven't moved so full 2dmg applies.

I'm at 1HP - critical condition. Marksman is healthy at dist=2, Remedy is healthy at dist=3. Orders say target medic if no one is wounded. Remedy is the priority target. I'm at (2,5), Remedy at (2,2) - dist=3, outside range-2. I need to move closer but NOT adjacent. Moving to (3,4) gets me dist=sqrt(1+4)~2.2, still out of range-2. Moving to (2,4) puts me on a trap - bad. Moving to (3,4) gives dist to Remedy = sqrt(1+4) > 2, still out of range. Actually let me check: from (3,4) to Remedy (2,2): |3-2|+|4-2|=1+2=3, still out of range. From (1,4) to Remedy (2,2): 1+2=3, out of range. No move gets Remedy in range-2. Marksman is at dist=2 from current position - in range. With only 1HP I'm desperate. Precision shot Marksman (dist=2, no movement needed). Stay put to avoid moving penalty. Fire precision_shot at Marksman for 2dmg to secure a kill.

Enemies are approaching from the south. Marksman is at (2,3) and Watcher at (0,3), both dist=3. There's already a trap at (2,4). I should move south to (1,4) to get closer and place a trap at (0,4) or (1,3) to cover Watcher's likely advance path. Moving to (1,3) would put me in range for trap placement covering the corridor. Let me move to (1,4) and place a trap at (0,4) to block Watcher's advance toward our position.

Marksman is at (2,3) adjacent to me, critically wounded at 2/4 HP. Must patch them immediately. After healing, stay put or reposition — Snare is at (1,4) so moving north risks adjacency. I'll patch Marksman first, then wait.

Seer is out of scan range at dist=5. Hawk is at dist=4 but scan needs ≤4, and movement could bring me closer. Snare is at (1,4) dist=2 — if I move adjacent I get blocked. Need to stay away from Snare. Foresight shows Snare placed trap at (0,4) last turn — avoid that tile. I can move to (2,4) to get closer to Hawk (dist would be ~3) and then scan Hawk. Wait — Hawk is already scanned. Seer at (5,3) is the priority unknown. From (2,4) dist to Seer = 3+0=3 tiles, in range. Move to (2,4) then scan Seer. But (2,4) is adjacent to Snare at (1,4)? Dist from (2,4) to (1,4) = 1 — adjacent, so scan would be blocked. Instead move to (1,3): dist to Snare(1,4)=1, adjacent, blocked. Move to (1,2): dist to Snare=2, not adjacent. Dist from (1,2) to Seer(5,3) = 4+1=5, still out of range. Move to (3,3): dist to Snare(1,4)=2+1=3, safe. Dist from (3,3) to Seer(5,3)=2, in range! Scan Seer from (3,3). Valid move (3,3) is listed.

I'm at 2HP - critical danger. Foresight shows Seer will scan me at (2,3) then move to (5,3) - meaning an enemy oracle is coming to my position. Marksman will precision_shot Hawk at (2,5). All enemy prompts already known. I should reposition away from (5,3) where Seer is heading, and use scan on Remedy since she's at dist 4 - wait, Remedy is out of range at dist 4. Watcher is at (3,3) dist 2, already scanned. Marksman at (2,3) dist 3, already scanned. I need to survive - move away from (5,3) where Seer arrives. Move to (4,4) to stay safe distance, then scan isn't needed since all visible enemies scanned. I could recalibrate Hawk who is critical - but Hawk is at (2,5), not adjacent. Best play: move to (4,5) to escape Seer's destination, then wait since no useful targets. Actually recalibrate requires adjacent ally - Hawk at (2,5) is not adjacent. No adjacent allies. I'll move to (4,5) to escape, then wait.

I'm at (2,5) with 1HP - critical condition. No enemies are wounded, so orders say target the enemy medic (Remedy). Remedy is at (2,2), dist=3, which is beyond my range of 2. Marksman is at (2,3), dist=2, within range. I haven't moved this turn so precision_shot does full 2dmg. I need to check adjacency - Marksman is at (2,3) and I'm at (2,5), not adjacent. Trap at (2,4) blocks direct path south. Valid moves include (3,5) or (1,5) to stay safe. I should stay at current position or move away from danger. At 1HP I need to be careful. Firing precision_shot on Marksman (closest threat, in range) is best - can't reach Remedy. Stay put and shoot Marksman.

Hawk is critical at dist=2, precision_shot does 2dmg which should finish them. I haven't moved so precision_shot deals full 2dmg. Snare is nearby but not adjacent, so no blocking. After eliminating Hawk, I'll hold position.

Marksman is wounded at (2,3) and within range 2. I already have traps at (2,4) and (0,4). Marksman is moving north toward me. I should place a trap on a tile they're likely to pass through. Moving to (1,3) puts me closer and lets me threaten with pulse if Marksman advances. Better: stay at (1,4) and place trap at (1,3) to block their path north, or at (2,4) which is already trapped. Place trap at (1,2) - but that's behind Marksman. Best trap placement: (2,5) blocks escape north, but enemies are south of me. Marksman at (2,3) moving N could go to (2,4) - already trapped! Or (1,3) or (3,3). Place trap at (1,3) to cover their movement paths. I'm adjacent to Marksman (dist=2), so trap is NOT blocked by Denial since I'm not adjacent (need to be adjacent). Place trap at (1,3).

I'm at 2HP — critical. Watcher is in scan range at dist 3 but already scanned. All enemies already scanned. I need to avoid Marksman who used precision_shot toward (2,5) last turn — I'm at (4,5) so safe. Priority: stay alive. Move to (5,5) to increase distance from enemies, then wait. No useful scan targets (all already revealed). Snare ally can handle traps.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Marksman at (2,3) is critically wounded at 2/4 HP and is adjacent to me. I can use overclock on Marksman to give them 2 abilities next turn, which could be powerful given they're a striker. Snare is 3 tiles away so no blocking risk at current position. Move to stay adjacent to Marksman and use overclock on them.

Snare already scanned. Seer is out of range at dist 4 (need ≤4, but must be within 4 not equal). Moving to (4,4) would put Seer at dist 2, well in range. But I need to stay away from Snare - moving to (4,4) keeps me 4 tiles from Snare (safe). From (4,4) Seer at (5,5) is dist 2, easily in scan range. But Seer is wounded - scanning again isn't priority. Marksman is critical and needs recalibrate. Marksman is at (2,3). I need to be adjacent to recalibrate. From (3,3) I'm already adjacent to (2,3). So recalibrate Marksman now, then move away from Snare toward better position. After recalibrate, move to (4,3) to maintain distance from Snare and be positioned for next turn.

firstAction.addendum: You are critical HP - play defensively but keep pressure on. Focus precision shots on the wounded Seer at (5,5) to eliminate them. Stay behind cover and coordinate with Remedy for healing.

actions.thinking: Critical HP at 1/4. Seer is out of range at dist=5, can't reach with precision_shot. Snare is at dist=2 and healthy - not a priority kill. I have OVERCLOCKED so 2 ability uses. Moving toward Seer risks going adjacent to Snare (denial zone). Best play: move to (3,4) to gain distance from Snare and improve angle toward Seer, then use precision_shot on Snare (dist=2, in range) to do 2dmg. Second ability use: suppressing_fire on Snare to slow them. Actually Snare is healthy so precision_shot does 2dmg leaving them at 2HP. Better to fire both at Snare. Wait - if I move I only do 1dmg with precision_shot. Stay at current position: fire precision_shot at Snare (2dmg), then suppressing_fire at Snare (1dmg, slows). That kills Snare! Snare has unknown HP but listed as healthy. Two shots: 2+1=3dmg. Keep position, use both abilities on Snare.

Suppressed so movement reduced to 1. Marksman is critical at (2,3), distance 2 — within my attack range. Traps already at (2,4), (1,3), (0,4). Move to (2,4) is blocked by my own trap. Valid moves: (0,4), (1,3), (1,5), (2,4) — but (2,4) and (1,3) have traps so moving there would trigger them on me. Safe moves: (0,4) or (1,5). Marksman is critical — attack to finish them. I can attack from current position (1,4) since dist=2 and attack range is adjacent only (1 tile). Wait, attack is range adjacent only. Dist to Marksman is 2, so attack won't reach. Pulse hits all within 1 tile — Marksman at dist 2, too far. I can't directly damage Marksman this turn. Best play: move toward Marksman to get adjacent, then attack. Moving to (2,4) — wait, there's a trap at (2,4). That would hurt me. (1,3) also has a trap. Safe moves toward Marksman: none that don't trigger traps or go away. Stay at (1,4) and place a trap at (2,4)? No, (2,4) already has a trap. Place trap somewhere useful — Marksman at (2,3) moving N would go to (2,4) already trapped. Marksman might move to (1,3) — already trapped. Maybe trap (3,3) to cut off Watcher. But I'm suppressed and can't place traps when adjacent to... Marksman at dist 2, not adjacent. I can place traps. Trap range ≤2 tiles. (3,3) is dist 2 from me — valid. Place trap at (3,3) to intercept Watcher moving west. Then wait or move safely.

Seer is wounded at (5,5), distance 3, in scan range. Scan it to deal damage. Then recalibrate Marksman at (2,3) who is critical — but range is adjacent only, so I can't reach Marksman from here. Instead, move toward Marksman to get adjacent for recalibrate. Moving to (3,3) would put me adjacent to Marksman at (2,3). But Snare tried to trap (3,3) last turn — risky. Move to (3,4) instead — still within recalibrate range of... no, Marksman is at (2,3), (3,4) is distance 2, not adjacent. Scan Seer first (already known prompt but deals 1 damage to wounded Seer), then move closer. Actually scan first to damage Seer, then move to (3,3) to be adjacent to Marksman for next turn recalibrate. (3,3) had a failed trap attempt — it's clear. Scan Seer for damage, move to (3,4) to stay safe and position.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Marksman at (2,3) is critically wounded at 1/4 HP and is adjacent to me (dist=1). I should use overclock on Marksman to give them 2 abilities next turn — they're the damage dealer and desperately need to act. Then stay put or reposition. Snare is 3 tiles away so no blocking risk at current position.

I'm at 1HP — extremely fragile. Watcher is at (3,4), dist 3, already scanned. Remedy is out of range. Both enemy prompts are known. No new scan targets needed. Snare is wounded at (1,4) — I can recalibrate to buff them, but I need to be adjacent (range: adjacent only). Snare is at (1,4), I'm at (5,5) — too far. Best play is to stay alive. Move to (4,5) to maintain distance from threats, then wait. No useful ability to use from current or reachable position — recalibrate requires adjacency to Snare which is unreachable this turn, scan targets are already known.

I'm at (1,4) with 4/8 HP, moving S. Watcher is at (3,4) distance 2 - within attack range. Traps already at (2,4), (0,4), (1,3). Watcher is heading N toward me, likely to move through (2,4) which is already trapped. Remedy is at (2,2) out of range. Seer is critical at (4,5). I should attack Watcher since it's in range at dist 2, then consider positioning. Moving toward (2,3) would put me closer to threaten Remedy and maintain denial aura pressure on Watcher if it advances. Attack Watcher first (dist 2, in range), then move to (2,3) to cover more ground and potentially intercept Remedy.

I'm at 1HP — critically low. Priority is survival. Watcher is at (3,4), distance 2, and already scanned. Remedy is out of range. I need to recalibrate Snare (wounded ally at (2,3)) but they're not adjacent. I should move to increase distance from Watcher while staying useful. Moving to (5,5) puts me farther from enemies. From (5,5), Watcher at (3,4) is distance 3 — still in scan range. But I already have Watcher's prompt. Remedy is at (2,2), distance 5 from (5,5) — still out of scan range. Best play: move to (5,5) to maximize survival, then wait since I can't reach Snare to recalibrate and Watcher is already scanned.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). I'm adjacent to Snare (vector) so abilities are blocked by DENIAL zone — only basic attack or movement work. Watcher is wounded at (3,4) but not adjacent and I can't heal anyway. Best action: attack Snare who is wounded and adjacent, then move toward Watcher to support.

Both enemies already scanned. Seer is critical and highest priority target - scan it again for 1 damage to finish it off. Snare is wounded but I must not move adjacent (currently 2 tiles away, safe). I'll scan Seer at (5,5) distance 3 which is within range 4. Then recalibrate Remedy at (3,3) adjacent to boost effectiveness. Stay at current position to avoid getting adjacent to Snare.

secondAction.addendum: Priority target Seer at (5,5) is critical - focus attacks there. Snare at (2,3) is wounded and placing traps - avoid predicted movement tiles near it.

My Denial passive blocks some abilities. I could pulse to hit Remedy, then trap a likely escape/advance tile. Let me pulse first (hits Remedy at (3,3)), then trap (3,2) to block southern approach.

Patch is unavailable (0 uses left). Watcher at (3,4) is wounded but I can't heal. I'm adjacent to Snare's DENIAL zone so overclock is blocked too. I should move away from Snare to escape denial, then use overclock on Watcher next turn. Best move: step to (4,3) to escape denial zone while staying near Watcher. Then attack Snare if still in range, or wait.

Snare is already scanned. Foresight shows Seer moved to (5,5) — they're now a priority scan target. I need to reposition to reach Seer (5,5) within 4 tiles. From (3,4), distance to (5,5) is ~2.8 tiles, so I can scan from here. After scanning Seer, I'll recalibrate Remedy to boost damage on wounded Snare. Must stay away from Snare at (2,3).

Snare is already scanned and wounded. I should recalibrate Remedy (my damage dealer at 4,3) to boost effectiveness, then maintain position. Snare placed a trap at (3,3) last turn — avoid that tile. Stay at (3,4) to keep range on Snare without getting adjacent.

actions.thinking: I'm at (4,1) with 2HP - very low. Remedy is at (3,5), dist=5, out of range. Traps already placed at (3,2),(4,2) which are nearby. I need to stay alive and contribute.
